popularStory.description: Sir John Popham, England's Lord Chief Justice during the reigns of Queen Elizabeth I and James I; in office from 1592 until his death in June 1607, was one of that turbulent historical era's most colo …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Stourton於大約1465年出生時，她的父親John Stourton91歲，母親Katherine Payne72歲。她和Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1490年8月2日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特普雷斯頓 普盧可內特享年26歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦福利哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Stourton was born about 1465, her father, John Stourton, was 91 and her mother, Katherine Payne, was 72. She had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset. She died on 2 August 1490, in Preston Plucknett, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 26, and was buried in Fulham, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Stourton est née environ 1465, son père, John Stourton, avait 91 ans et sa mère, Katherine Payne, avait 72 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset. Elle est décédée le 2 août 1490, à Preston Plucknett, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterrée à Fulham, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Stourton um 1465 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Stourton 91 und ihre Mutter Katherine Payne 72. Sie hatte mit Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. August 1490 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Preston Plucknett, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Fulham, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Stourton è nata il circa 1465, sua padre, John Stourton, aveva 91 anni e sua madre, Katherine Payne, aveva 72 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset. Morì il 2 agosto 1490, nel Preston Plucknett, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolta a Fulham, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Stourtonが約1465年に生まれた時，父John Stourtonは91歳，母Katherine Payneは72歳であった。彼女はSir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somersetとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1490年8月2日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトプレストン プルクネットで26歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンフウルハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Stourton(이)가 대략 1465년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Stourton(은)는 91세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Payne(은)는 72세였다. 그녀는 Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 8월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 플레스턴 플럭넷에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 프함에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Stourton родилась около 1465 г., её отцу по имени John Stourton было 91 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine Payne, 72. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Sir Robert Hill Of Spaxton Somerset. Она умерла 2 августа 1490 г. в местности престон плуккнетт, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 26 лет и была похоронена в местности фьулхам, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
